item.title: Getting Started in Information Technology
item.category: "IT career" , "getting started in IT" , "IT beginner" , "IT career path" , "IT specializations" , "home lab" , "IT training" , "entry level IT"
item.description: Everything you need to know to begin an IT career — from understanding the field to building your first home lab and choosing a specialization.
